#  View a Labor Budget to Actual Report (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-android/permissions)


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Import a Unit Quantity Based Budget](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-project/tutorials/import-a-unit-quantity-based-budget)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Timesheets** tool on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the **Reports** ![Icon Reports Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a36c92fc23162f1e8f31566c6866bdfe/586f42c7331c74405d724ada1dd54ca2/icon-reports-android.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  3. Tap the **Hours** tab to view the project's Labor Hours Summary Report.  
![Timesheets Android Report Hours Tab](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a57390be9891e99789fd565de74b84ee/f98b4343a64619abc786be1bc926952e/timesheets-android-report-hours-tab.png?fm=webp)
  4. To return to the Timesheets tool, tap the **X** icon.


## See Also
  * [View Quantities on a Timesheet (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-android/tutorials/view-quantities-on-a-timesheet-android)
  * [View Field Production Report (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-android/tutorials/view-field-production-report-android)
  * [Add Quantities to a Timesheet (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-android/tutorials/add-quantities-to-a-timesheet-android)
title: View a Labor Budget to Actual Report (Android)
description: How to view a labor budget to actual report on an Android mobile device.
